sc.dei.s: Patagonia published diversity data in 2023 annual report; maintains funded DEI initiatives per public disclosures.
sc.environment.s: B Corp certified since 2012; Science Based Targets initiative approved 2021; Scope 1+2 emissions disclosed annually.

sc.charity.s: $140M+ donations to environmental nonprofits 2022-2024 (~1% revenue); documented grant programs via Patagonia Works.
sc.animals.s: No Leaping Bunny or PETA certification; synthetic materials used in products; no documented animal testing identified.
sc.privacy.s: No documented HIBP breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions identified.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio data not publicly disclosed.
